'''mazhacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycography|mycography]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-zh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycography|mycography]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mazhacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæzhæchæth|mæzhæchæth]] || [[word:mæzhæchæj|mæzhæchæj]] || [[word:mæzhæchæsh|mæzhæchæsh]] || [[word:mæzhæchæ|mæzhæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mazhazhachath|mazhazhachath]] || [[word:mazhazhachaj|mazhazhachaj]] || [[word:mazhazhachash|mazhazhachash]] || [[word:mazhazhacha|mazhazhacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mazhachath|mazhachath]] || [[word:mazhachaj|mazhachaj]] || [[word:mazhachash|mazhachash]] || [[word:mazhacha|mazhacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mazhafchath|mazhafchath]] || [[word:mazhafchaj|mazhafchaj]] || [[word:mazhafchash|mazhafchash]] || [[word:mazhafchaf|mazhafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mazhachatha|mazhachatha]] || [[word:mazhachaja|mazhachaja]] || [[word:mazhachasha|mazhachasha]] || [[word:mazhachaka|mazhachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mazhachath|mazhachath]] || [[word:mazhachaj|mazhachaj]] || [[word:mazhachash|mazhachash]] || [[word:mazhacha|mazhacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mazhachathal|mazhachathal]] || [[word:mazhachajal|mazhachajal]] || [[word:mazhachashal|mazhachashal]] || [[word:mazhachakal|mazhachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mazhachathatha|mazhachathatha]] || [[word:mazhachajaja|mazhachajaja]] || [[word:mazhachashasha|mazhachashasha]] || [[word:mazhachaka|mazhachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mazhachathan|mazhachathan]] || [[word:mazhachajan|mazhachajan]] || [[word:mazhachashan|mazhachashan]] || [[word:mazhachakan|mazhachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mazhachathaoro|mazhachathaoro]] || [[word:mazhachajaoro|mazhachajaoro]] || [[word:mazhachashaoro|mazhachashaoro]] || [[word:mazhachakaoro|mazhachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
